generated_oml:
instance SystemUnderStudy : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle built from a Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium vehicle retrofitted with autonomy components"
    base:contains JetsonOrinNano, HokuyoUST10LX, IntelDeepsenseD435i, VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, VedderElectronicSpeedController, SteeringServo
]

instance JetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer for onboard computation"
]

instance HokuyoUST10LX : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for point cloud data collection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataRawTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435i : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for visual perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraDataRawTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor for measuring ego vehicle speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataRawTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor for measuring steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataRawTransmitted
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for motor speed control"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo for directional control"
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataRawTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LX
]

instance DepthCameraDataRawTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435i
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataRawTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataRawTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataRaw : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataRawTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANProcessingEnabler
]

instance DepthCameraDataRaw : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw depth camera data for visual perception"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraDataRawTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataRaw : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw ego vehicle speed data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataRawTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFE
]

instance SteeringAngleDataRaw : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataRawTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFE
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Translation Functional Entity for serialization and unit conversion"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DataTranslationFE
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DataTranslationFE
]

instance ObjectTracksDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DataTranslationFE
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Serialized and unit-converted ego vehicle speed data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCLogicEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Serialized and unit-converted steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCLogicEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed object tracks data from DBSCAN and Kalman filter"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFE
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ThreeDVisualizationEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering algorithm applied to LiDAR point cloud data for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANProcessingEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking based on DBSCAN clustered data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANProcessingEnabler
]

instance DBSCANProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filter processing for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ACCControlLogic : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant ACC control logic for speed adjustment"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCLogicEnabler
]

instance ACCLogicEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACC control logic execution on Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for storing vehicle state data and object tracks as time-series"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration and development"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for inter-process communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for scripting and data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for performance-critical components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance ActuationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Actuation functional entity for converting desired speed commands into motor voltage commands"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data monitoring including visualization, data saving, and report generation"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualization, GeneratedHumanReadableReports, DataSaving
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloading ACC logic computation to Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCSpeedAdjustmentCommand
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote control of ACC functionality"
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteControlOfACC
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization of object tracks, vehicle state, and projected path"
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTracksVisualization, ProjectedPathDisplay
]

instance VehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state parameters"
]

instance ObjectTracksVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of detected object tracks"
]

instance ProjectedPathDisplay : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Display of projected vehicle path based on ACC decisions"
]

instance GeneratedHumanReadableReports : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Human-readable reports of object tracks and vehicle state for developer troubleshooting"
]

instance DataSaving : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Saving vehicle state data and object tracks to persistent storage"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ACCSpeedAdjustmentCommand : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command for speed adjustment via ACC logic"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RemoteControlOfACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote control activation of ACC functionality"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DataMonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Monitoring Functional Entity"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3D Visualization Functional Entity"
    DTDFVocab:enables ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Remote commands (enable/disable ACC, desired speed adjustments, emergency braking) converted to motor voltage commands and steering signals via the Actuation FE, with latency constrained to ≤100 ms."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with ≤100 ms end-to-end network latency (per 3GPP TS 22.185) and 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy across all components for event ordering and coordination."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated entities: Physical Twin Entity (on-vehicle sensors/actuators), Digital Twin Entity (ACC computation, data storage), User Entity (3D visualization/control panel), and Cross-System Entity (Data Translation FE), communicating via ROS2 intra-entity and Wi-Fi inter-entity networks."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As-operated phase during vehicle operation, supporting optimization, health monitoring, and real-time decision-making for the Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) system in operational conditions."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 network for intra-entity communication, Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication, Data Translation FE handling serialization, message alignment, and unit conversions with ≤100 ms latency constraints."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano (vehicle), Digital Twin Entity components (e.g., ACC, Data Storage) on cloud/server, User Entity on remote devices, with Data Storage external to the vehicle."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for DT framework, ISO 15622 for ACC functionality (performance class I), and 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V communication latency requirements."
]
